title: Cosmogarden 2024 speaker profile: Ghezzi Michele
evidence_summary: Lists 'Ghezzi Michele' as Dottore Agronomo; states he is ODAF Milano, libero professionista; lists consulting sectors and technical focus on PGPR, antagonist fungi, mycorrhizae, biological fertilizers, humus, leonardite, amendments, and targeted fertilization plans for small fruits.
website_use: Strong source for About, Services, and technical positioning.
rights_note: Safe to link and paraphrase with attribution. Do not copy page photos without permission.

title: Cosmogarden event: Coltivazione biologica integrata di piccoli frutti
evidence_summary: Lists the 6 April event, its topic, and speakers Dott. Agr. Nicola Noé and Dott. Agr. Michele Ghezzi.
rights_note: Safe to link; do not reuse images without permission.

title: Libreria Universitaria book listing: Coltivazione biologica e integrata di piccoli frutti

title: ItalianBerry article: Piccoli frutti: un’analisi degli impianti in Italia settentrionale
evidence_summary: Announces and summarizes the book published 15 March; describes focus on raspberries, blackberries, currants, gooseberries, blueberries, lonicera, wild strawberry, northern Italy, pedoclimatic conditions, cultivar choice, organic materials, and beneficial microorganisms.
website_use: Use as press/reading link and to describe book themes.
rights_note: Article can be linked. Avoid copying full article or reusing images unless license/permission is explicit.

title: ItalianBerry article: Tecniche sostenibili di coltivazione dei piccoli frutti
evidence_summary: States that at Macfrut 2025 Michele Ghezzi would present an innovative organic/integrated approach to berries; summarizes themes of site analysis, soil/water, certified varieties, biological fertilization, zero-impact pest/disease control, blueberry protocol, mycorrhizae, PGPR, seaweed, amino acids, plant extracts, and applicability to raspberries, blackberries, currants, gooseberries, open field and soilless systems.
website_use: Use in News/Press and as source for service language, with paraphrase.
rights_note: Safe to link; images and article media should not be reused without permission.

title: Fondazione Fojanini course PDF: L’agricoltura verso la transizione ecologica
evidence_summary: Lists a course between February and April. Includes a 3-hour lesson 'Pratiche e tecniche per la gestione del suolo e dell’acqua nell’ottica del risparmio delle risorse' curated by Michele Ghezzi Dottore Agronomo. The course is in person at Fondazione Fojanini.

title: CLT article: Sperimentazione dei prodotti CLT alla Fondazione Fojanini
evidence_summary: Describes a 2021 experimentation project with Fondazione Fojanini on Humus CLT and Onus CLT for small fruits, especially giant American blueberry. States the experimentation was carried out by Dott. Agr. Michele Ghezzi, a technician with specific expertise in small-fruit plantings in Lombardy.
rights_note: Safe to link. Do not reuse company logos/images without permission.
